metadata.title: Back Software | Websites, Marketing & Custom Software - Ivrea (TO)
metadata.description: Digital agency in Ivrea (Turin). We build professional websites, Meta/Google Ads campaigns, custom management software, photo and video services. Concrete solutions to grow your business.
metadata.ogTitle: Back Software | Websites, Marketing & Custom Software
metadata.ogDescription: Technology that simplifies, not complicates. We build your project as if it were our own. Digital agency in Ivrea, Turin.

hero.subtitle: Technology that simplifies, not complicates. We build your project as if it were our own.
hero.visualPointerHint: Desktop: follow with the mouse and click — the burst depends on where you press

whyUs.title: Why Back Software.
whyUs.subtitle: We're not just developers. We're partners who understand your business.

01.title: Listening
01.desc: Before writing code, we listen. Understanding the problem is more important than the technical solution.

02.title: Clarity
02.desc: No incomprehensible jargon. We explain everything simply, with no surprises.

03.title: Results
03.desc: We don't sell projects, we sell solutions that actually work in the real world.

caseFamiglia.title: Family Homes
caseFamiglia.desc: Elder care homes: proprietary digital ecosystem and true end-to-end support.
caseFamiglia.details: Family Homes are elder-care facilities that need serious organisation and tools. We support you from opening through day-to-day operations with bespoke proprietary software, hardware integration where it matters, and one interconnected digital ecosystem — not just another management system. Strategic partnership with Cristina Malvini, a leading consultant in the sector. Communication, processes and data working together: innovation that shows up in real operations.

6mesi.name: 6 Months
6mesi.desc: Complete solution for 6 months: website, social, campaigns and bookings

3mesi.name: 3 Months
3mesi.desc: Complete solution for 3 months: website, social, campaigns and bookings

spot.name: Spot Campaign
spot.desc: Spot campaign for 6 months with full management

expand.partner: With Cristina Malvini · leading consultancy for Family Homes
expand.slide0: Elder-care facilities: we stay with you end-to-end, from launch planning to daily operations — with Cristina Malvini as our sector partner for grounded, expert guidance.
expand.slide1: More than «another CMS»: a proprietary ecosystem linking bespoke software, integrations and hardware where needed — designed as one interconnected stack.
expand.slide2: Real innovation: clear workflows, connected data, less friction. Built for operators in assisted living — aligned with Cristina Malvini’s strategic vision.
expand.imageAlt0: Welcoming interior of an elder-care residence
expand.imageAlt2: Architecture and thoughtful detail in the facility
expand.imageAlt3: Welcoming spaces designed for calm and care

workflow.title: Our method.
workflow.subtitle: A clear process, from first analysis to delivery and support.
workflow.kicker: Designed to reduce uncertainty and speed up decision making.
workflow.forecastSubtitle: After analysis, we define realistic growth hypotheses and the key actions to validate.
workflow.footerNote: Every project starts from your objectives and evolves with measurable iterations.
outcomes: Clear priorities and realistic scope before development starts.
Shared roadmap to reduce rework and decision bottlenecks.
Continuous optimization loop based on real user and business signals.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.desc: We understand goals, constraints, and priorities to define the right solution.
analysis.deliverable: Deliverable: strategic brief with priorities and constraints.

design.title: Design
design.desc: We design structure and execution plan with you, without unnecessary complexity.
design.deliverable: Deliverable: UX/UI flow, architecture, and implementation plan.

launch.title: Launch & Growth
launch.desc: We release, monitor results, and optimize continuously based on real data.
launch.deliverable: Deliverable: monitored release and optimization backlog.

cantina.name: Winery Management System
cantina.desc: Complete winemaking management system for a winery with online sales of experiences, gift coupon management and international shipping.

crmMagazzino.desc: Custom management system for warehouse management, storage and shipping with advanced logistics optimization.

bpres.name: BPres Attendance
bpres.desc: Complete attendance system to manage check-ins, check-outs, breaks. Automatic leave calculation and vacation/sick leave requests with email approval.

autodemolizioni.name: Auto-Demolition System
autodemolizioni.desc: Complete CRM for reclamation paperwork, state portal registration, Rentri API, component sales, tank management and CER code control.

crmTask.name: CRM Task & Projects
crmTask.desc: Management system for projects, tasks and workflow progress. Client and collaborator management with AI integration via API.

myPlace.name: My Place Malpensa
myPlace.desc: Multilingual website with Octorate connection for centralized booking engine and automated reservation management.

marazzato.name: Marazzato Moto
marazzato.desc: Showcase website with dynamic product loading from dedicated panel and online showcase for selling motorcycles and accessories.

contact.title: Let's talk about your future.
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. First we analyze, then we tell you what you really need.

step1.title: Your details
step1.name: Name
step1.emailError: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. name@company.com).
step1.prefixError: Invalid prefix. Use international format, e.g. +39.
step1.phoneRequired: Country prefix and mobile number are required.

step3.title: Tell us
step3.placeholderDefault: Briefly tell us what you need...

siti: I have a business and need a showcase website...
I'd like an e-commerce to sell online...
I need a landing page for a service...
marketing: I want more customers with online advertising...
I need an effective social strategy...
I want to promote a specific offer...
foto: I need professional photos for the website...
I'd like a video to present the company...
I need to photograph products for the catalog...
grafica: I don't have a logo and want to start from scratch...
My brand is old, I'd like to renew it...
I need a complete visual identity...
software: I need a custom management system...
I need a web app for bookings...
casa: I manage a facility and need booking...
I want a website with online bookings...
altro: I'm not sure what I need, I'd like to discuss...

step4.title: Confirm and send request
step4.subtitle: Final step: choose the sending channel. We pre-fill the message in an orderly and professional way.

footer.description: We design and develop digital solutions with clear objectives, defined timelines and continuous support.

legal.privacyDescription: Information on the processing of personal data and data subject rights — Back Software.
legal.cookiesDescription: Use of cookies and similar technologies on backsoftware.it — Back Software.

legal.disclaimer: Texts updated 21 April 2026: no cookie banner (first-party tools and technical/necessary cookies only, as described in the policies). Review periodically with your legal adviser.

oracle.title: THE MAGIC BUSINESS ORACLE
oracle.subtitle: Type a work doubt and consult the Ivrea Oracle.
oracle.placeholder: e.g.: should I launch an e-commerce?
answers: Data confirms: proceed. (If you need technical help, you know where to find us).
Terrible idea. It has the same success probability as a website on Floppy Disk.
Definitely yes. Anything is better than Comic Sans in 2026.
I can't say without caffeine. Buy Back Software a coffee.
Your destiny CSS is corrupted. Request urgent UX review.
The stars say yes, and so does Google Analytics.

slot.title: LUCKY LEVER
slot.subtitle: Draw a prize from Back Software's virtual machine.

prizes.coffee: You won: A Suspended Espresso! ☕ Stop by our Ivrea agency to claim it.
prizes.bugs: You won: 3 Production Bugs! 🎉 (Don't worry, we'll fix them).
prizes.pizza: You won: Being the first to buy our team pizza!
prizes.client: You won: A client saying 'Yes but my cousin does it cheaper'. Condolences.
prizes.nerd: You won: The immense respect of Back Software nerds! (It counts on your resume).
prizes.nothing: You won... absolutely nothing! But try again, the algorithm is forgiving today.

excuse.title: EXCUSE GENERATOR
excuse.subtitle: Need to justify a delay with your boss or client? We've got you covered.
excuses: The DNS haven't aligned with earth meridians, it will take 24 hours.
A solar flare reset the microservice cache in Northern Europe.
The server joined the transit strike, we're negotiating with the RAM.
There's a memory leak caused by a cat on the German datacenter keyboard.
The backend channeling flow pipe broke. Waiting for technician.
Deploy on Friday? The coffee machine took control of the infrastructure.
The JavaScript framework decided to rewrite itself due to identity crisis.
There's too much quantum latency in the hallway router cable.

jsonLd.businessDesc: Digital agency specialized in websites, digital marketing, custom software, photo and video. Concrete solutions to grow your business in Ivrea and throughout Piedmont.

jsonLd.marketingOfferDesc: Meta Ads, Google Ads campaigns and digital marketing strategies
